_README: Canonization / instituting-feast dates for Sancti entries.
Maps Sancti file-stem → metadata. Used by the year-aware corpus filter
in Phase 7+ to suppress saints / feasts that didn't exist in the
year being rendered.
Schema:
added         year the saint/feast was added to the Roman calendar
(canonized + universal-calendar promotion date)
elevated      year the rank was raised (e.g. Class III → II)
— same year as `added` if no later promotion
suppressed    year the saint/feast was REMOVED from the universal
calendar (often 1955, 1960, 1969). null if still
present in 1962.
rank_history  list of [year, rank] pairs: rank changes over time.
First entry = `added` year + initial rank.
source        citation: bull, papal document, Acta SS., Wikipedia.
Default for missing entries: { added: 1570, suppressed: null }
(saint was on the calendar in 1570, never removed pre-1962).
Canonical reference: Pius V's _Quo primum_ (1570), as augmented by
Acta Apostolicae Sedis through the 1962 Missale Romanum.
Sources we cross-reference (in order of authority):
1. Acta Apostolicae Sedis (each papal bull / decree)
2. DiPippo's *Compendium Romani Breviarii* (1962 edition)
3. _Liber Pontificalis_
4. Wikipedia 'List of saints canonized by Pope X'
Initial entries below cover the high-impact post-1570 additions
that affect the 11-year sweep failures. Phase 7+ extends to
every saint that was added/elevated/suppressed between 1570
TBD: this is a stub. Phase 7's first deliverable is to populate
this from the Acta SS. + DiPippo without manual data entry of
all 250+ entries. Possible approaches: parse upstream's
Tabulae/Kalendaria/<rubric>.txt files (which encode rank-by-rubric
for each date) into a temporal table; or scrape Wikipedia's
'List of saints canonized by ...' tables.

Sancti/03-19.source: Pius IX 1870 'Quemadmodum Deus' (Patron of Universal Church)

Sancti/05-31.source: Pius XII 1954 _Ad caeli Reginam_; instituted 31 May 1955

Sancti/06-21.source: Benedict XIII canonization 1726; Benedict XIV elevation

Sancti/07-05oct.officium: In Octava S. Antonii M. Zaccaria
Sancti/07-05oct.source: Leo XIII 1897 instituted; Pius XII 1955 _Cum nostra hac aetate_ abolished octave

Sancti/12-08.source: Sixtus IV 1476 'Cum praeexcelsa'; Pius IX 1854 _Ineffabilis Deus_ defined dogma
